content.text: System shall navigate the user to the Report screen when the user navigates from Rack-> IRDS-> Report.
I navigate via Rack → IRDS → Report
the system shall open the Report screen.
System shall display a Search Reports input field allowing user to search reports by report name or Id.
the system shall allow search by report name or ID.
System shall filter and display reports matching the entered search keyword.
the system shall display matching reports.
System shall display a Manage Templates option allowing the user to navigate to report template screen.
the system shall navigate to template screen.
System shall display a Create Report button allowing the user to create a new report.
the system shall open report creation flow.
System shall display a Recent Reports section showing recently accessed or created reports.
the system shall show Recent Reports section.
System shall display each Recent Report card with Report name, Template name, (qwe) Creation date, and status.
the system shall display report name, template name, creation date, and status.
System shall display Report status label (e.g. Draft) for each recent report.
the system shall show status label.

I can view or edit it.
the system shall open Report Viewer screen.

the system shall display Report Viewer with title.
System shall display the report name in the header section.
the system shall show report name.
System shall display the current report status (e.g., Draft) next to the report name.
the system shall show report status.
System shall display breadcrumb navigation indicating the report location within the system hierarchy.
the system shall show breadcrumb navigation.
System shall display a Preview button to allow users to preview the report.
the system shall show report preview.
System shall display a Save button to save the report.
System shall display a Download Report button to download the generated report.
I can share or store it.

the system shall provide supported format (e.g., PDF).
System shall display a Contents navigation panel listing report sections.
the system shall show contents navigation panel.
System shall display sections such as Overview, Section 1, and other configured sections.
the system shall show sections like Overview, Section 1, etc.
System shall allow users to click a section from the contents panel to navigate to that section in the report.
click a section in the contents panel,
I can navigate to that section.
the system shall navigate to that section.
System shall visually highlight the currently selected section in the navigation panel.
the system shall highlight the selected section.
System shall display report data including Site.
the system shall show site information.
System shall display Inspection Date associated with the report.
I know when it was conducted.
the system shall show inspection date.
System shall display the template name used to generate the report.
the system shall show template name.
System shall display “Not specified” when site information is not available.
a default value when site is missing,
System shall display the report title within the report content area.
the system shall display report title.
System shall display report sections dynamically based on the template configuration.
the system shall display sections dynamically.
System shall display section headers such as Section 1.
the system shall show section headers such as Section 1.
System shall display configured modules within each section.
the system shall show configured modules.
System shall display a placeholder message when a module is not configured.

a clear message for missing modules,
the system shall show configuration message.
System shall display placeholder containers for modules such as Findings Log, Photo Gallery, and Compliance Score.
the system shall show placeholders for modules.
System shall allow vertical scrolling within the report viewer when content exceeds the screen height.
the system shall allow vertical scrolling.
System shall maintain synchronization between section navigation and report content position.
the system shall sync navigation and content.
System shall dynamically render modules and sections based on the selected report template.
the system shall render modules dynamically based on the selected report template.
System shall display an All-Reports section listing all available reports.
the system shall show All Reports section.

content.text: System shall display search bar within the All-Reports section to filter reports.

a status filter dropdown available in the Reports screen

the dropdown includes the following options: All Status, Draft, Ready, Downloaded, Archived.

the system filters the reports based on the selected report date or report name   criteria.

the system shall list all errors.

the system shall redirect to template builder.

the system shall display Publish button.

313.title: Expand Preview Area in Preview Mode

content.text: The system shall expand the report preview area to utilize the available screen space after the Contents panel is hidden.
the report preview area expanded after the Contents panel is hidden
I can view more report content.
the Contents panel is hidden in Preview mode
the system expands the report preview area to utilize the available screen space.

314.title: Replace Preview Button with Exit Preview

content.text: The system shall replace the Preview button with an Exit Preview button while the user is in Preview mode.
the Preview button replaced with an Exit Preview button
I can clearly identify that Preview mode is active.
the system replaces the Preview button with an Exit Preview button.
The system shall display the report in a read-only preview layout while the Contents panel is hidden.
the report displayed in a read-only layout during Preview mode
I can review the report without editing it.
the user is in Preview mode
the system renders the report in a read-only preview layout.

316.title: Preserve Report Structure in Preview Mode

content.text: The system shall preserve the current report structure and section arrangement while switching to Preview mode.
the report structure preserved while switching modes
the preview accurately reflects the configured report.
the report contains sections and configured structure
the user switches to Preview mode
the system preserves the current report structure and section arrangement.
The system shall allow users to exit Preview mode by clicking the Exit Preview button.
exit Preview mode using the Exit Preview button
I can return to editing the report.
the user is in Preview mode
the system returns the interface to edit mode.

318.title: Restore Contents Panel After Exiting Preview

content.text: The system shall automatically display the “Contents” side panel again when the user exits Preview mode.
the Contents panel restored after exiting Preview mode
I can navigate report sections again.
the system automatically displays the Contents side panel again.
The system shall preserve all entered report data and unsaved changes while toggling between Preview and Exit Preview modes.
all report data and unsaved changes preserved while toggling modes
no work is lost when previewing the report.
the user toggles between Preview and Exit Preview modes
the system preserves all entered report data and unsaved changes.
The system shall visually distinguish the Exit Preview button from the Preview button to indicate the current mode state.
the Exit Preview button visually differentiated from the Preview button
I can easily identify the current mode state.
the user is in Preview mode
the system visually distinguishes the Exit Preview button from the Preview button.
The system shall ensure that the Contents panel visibility state changes dynamically based on whether the user is in Preview mode or edit mode.
the Contents panel visibility updated dynamically based on mode
the interface reflects the current editing state.
the user switches between edit mode and Preview mode
the system dynamically updates the Contents panel visibility according to the active mode.
System shall display a Save Report modal when the user clicks the Save button.
a Save Report modal displayed when clicking Save
I can confirm report save details.
the report editor screen is displayed
the system displays the Save Report modal.
System shall display a modal title “Save Report” with a close (X) icon.
the Save Report modal title and close icon displayed
I can identify and dismiss the modal if needed.
the Save Report modal is displayed
the system displays the title “Save Report” with a close (X) icon.
System shall display a descriptive message indicating that “This will save the report”
a descriptive save confirmation message displayed
I understand the purpose of the action.
the Save Report modal is displayed
the system displays the message: “This will save the report”

325.title: Display Report Name in Save Modal

content.text: System shall display the Report Name in the modal.
the Report Name displayed in the Save modal
I can confirm the correct report is being saved.
the Save Report modal is displayed
the system displays the Report Name.
System shall display current Status of the report (e.g., draft)
the current report status displayed in the Save modal
I can review the report state before saving.
the Save Report modal is displayed
the system displays the current report status (e.g., Draft).
System shall display the Template name associated with the report.
the associated template name displayed in the Save modal
I can confirm which template the report uses.
the Save Report modal is displayed
the system displays the associated template name.
System shall display a Cancel button to close the modal without saving.
a Cancel button displayed in the Save modal
I can close the modal without saving.
the Save Report modal is displayed
the system closes the modal without saving the report.
System shall display a Save Report button to confirm and save the report.
a Save Report button displayed in the modal
I can confirm the save action.
the Save Report modal is displayed
the system displays a Save Report button.
System shall save the report details when the user clicks Save Report.
the report details saved when confirming the action
the Save Report modal is displayed
the system saves the report details successfully.
System shall display a success toast – “Report saved successfully”.
a success toast displayed after saving the report
I know the report was saved successfully.
the system displays the toast message:

332.title: Close Save Modal Using Close Icon

content.text: System shall allow the user to close the modal using the (x) icon.
close the Save Report modal using the close (X) icon
I can dismiss the modal quickly.
the Save Report modal is displayed
the user clicks the close (X) icon
The system shall display a Download Report modal when the user initiates the report download action.
a Download Report modal displayed when initiating a download
I can choose the export format for the report.
the user initiates the report download action
the system displays the Download Report modal.

334.title: Display Export Formats as Selectable Cards

content.text: The system shall display available report export formats as selectable cards within the Download Report modal.
available export formats displayed as selectable cards
I can easily choose a report format.
the Download Report modal is displayed
the system displays available export formats as selectable cards.
The system shall provide export format options including PDF Document, Word Document, and Data Export (CSV).
I can select the appropriate output type.
the Download Report modal is displayed
the system displays the following options:
The system shall display a title, icon, and description for each export format option.
each export format option to display a title, icon, and description
I can understand the purpose of each format.
the system displays a title, icon, and description for each export option.
The system shall display the description “Professional format for reports and presentations” for the PDF Document export option.
descriptive guidance displayed for PDF export
I understand the purpose of the PDF format.
the PDF Document export option is displayed
the system displays the description: “Professional format for reports and presentations”
The system shall display the description “Editable format for further modifications” for the Word Document export option.
descriptive guidance displayed for Word export
I understand the purpose of the editable document format.
the Word Document export option is displayed
the system displays the description: “Editable format for further modifications”
The system shall display the description “Raw data for analysis and processing” for the Data Export (CSV) export option.
descriptive guidance displayed for CSV export
I understand the purpose of the data export format.
the Data Export (CSV) option is displayed
the system displays the description: “Raw data for analysis and processing”
The system shall visually highlight the currently selected export format option.
the selected export format visually highlighted
I can identify the active selection.
the system visually highlights the selected export format card.

341.title: Display Check Indicator on Selected Export Format

content.text: The system shall display a selection indicator/checkmark on the selected export format card.
a selection indicator displayed on the selected export card
I can clearly confirm my selection.
the system displays a selection indicator/checkmark on the selected export format card.
The system shall allow users to select only one export format at a time.
only one export format selectable at a time
the user selects an export format
the system allows selection of only one export format at a time.
The system shall mark the PDF Document option as Recommended when configured by the system.
I can identify preferred export options easily.
PDF Document is configured as recommended
the export format cards are displayed
the system marks the PDF Document option as Recommended.
The system shall automatically select a default export format when the modal is opened, if configured by the system.
a default export format automatically selected
I can proceed quickly with common export actions.
a default export format is configured by the system
the Download Report modal is opened
the system automatically selects the configured default export format.

345.title: Enable Download Button After Valid Selection

content.text: The system shall enable the Download button only when a valid export format is selected.
the Download button enabled only after selecting a valid export format
the Download Report modal is displayed
the system keeps the Download button disabled.
a valid export format is selected
the system enables the Download button.
The system shall initiate report generation and file download in the selected format when the user clicks the Download button.
the report generated and downloaded in the selected format
I can access the exported report file.
a valid export format is selected
the system downloads the report file in the selected format.
The system shall generate the report in PDF format when the user selects PDF Document.
the report generated in PDF format
I can use it for professional presentation or sharing.
PDF Document is selected as the export format
the system generates the report in PDF format.
The system shall generate the report in Word document format when the user selects Word Document.
the report generated in Word document format
I can edit and modify the report further.
Word Document is selected as the export format
the system generates the report in Word document format.
The system shall generate the report in CSV format when the user selects Data Export (CSV).
the report generated in CSV format
I can analyse and process raw report data.
Data Export (CSV) is selected as the export format
the system generates the report in CSV format.
The system shall allow users to close the modal without downloading by clicking the Cancel button.
close the Download Report modal using the Cancel button
I can exit the download workflow without downloading the report.
the Download Report modal is displayed
the system closes the modal without downloading the report.

351.title: Close Download Modal Using Close Icon

content.text: The system shall allow users to close the modal using the Close (X) icon.
close the Download Report modal using the Close (X) icon
I can dismiss the modal quickly.
the Download Report modal is displayed
the user clicks the Close (X) icon
The system shall preserve the selected export option until the modal is closed or the selection is changed.
the selected export option preserved while the modal remains open
I do not lose my selection unintentionally.
the user continues interacting within the modal
the system preserves the selected export option
Until the modal is closed or the selection is changed.
The system shall prevent users from selecting multiple export formats simultaneously.
select only one export format at a time
I can avoid conflicting export selections.
the user selects an export format
the system allows to select only one export format at a time.

354.title: Display Export Formats in Vertical Layout

content.text: The system shall display the export format options in a vertically stacked layout within the modal.
export format options displayed in a vertically stacked layout
the options are easy to browse and compare.
the Download Report modal is displayed
the system displays export format options in a vertically stacked layout within the modal.
The system shall display a success toast while the report file is being downloaded “download started, downloading “report name”
a success toast displayed when the report download starts
I know the file generation and download process has begun.
a valid export format is selected
the system displays the toast message: “Download started, downloading ‘Report Name’”

356.title: Use Correct File Extension for Downloads

content.text: The system shall ensure downloaded files use the appropriate file extension based on the selected export format.
downloaded files to use the correct file extension
the exported files open correctly in compatible applications.
a report is downloaded in a selected export format
the system uses the appropriate file extension based on the selected export format
